headline: Iran's Official News Agency on MOU text: Iran and the US agree to resolve the status of stockpiled enriched material through a mutually agreed mechanism.
Fed's Chair Warsh: A new communication framework by the year-end wouldn't surprise.
Trump: Iran deal signed over the next 48 hours. Iran is signing in final form, but not yet determined.
Trump on Fed raising rates possibly: It could happen.

Fed's Chair Warsh: Financial market prices are the most important source of information to guide central bankers.

Fed's Chair Warsh: I would be open-minded if the Fed data task force had recommendations on how to improve official statistics. Private companies are working with real-time information.
Fed's Chair Warsh: Most data we consume have old-fashioned survey methods.
Fed's Chair Warsh: We've missed the inflation goal for five years, we're going to fix it.
Fed's Chair Warsh: There are some changes to come, they may be worthy of press conferences.
Fed's Chair Warsh asked about the future of press conferences: They can be a very useful way of communicating, but I want to have something important to say for pressers.
Fed's Chair Warsh: I am impressed by the open-mindedness of colleagues over the last two days.
Fed's Chair Warsh: I don't want to prejudge the outcomes of the communications review.
Fed's Chair Warsh: For me, submitting a dot is not helpful in the conduct of policy.
